info.name: OFROO — Merchant Registration, Application Status & Legal Pages
info.description:
Three new endpoint groups:
1. POST /api/mobile/auth/register-merchant — register as merchant (requires accepting T&C)
2. GET  /api/mobile/merchant/application/status — check approval status
3. GET  /api/mobile/app/legal-pages — all 4 legal pages managed from the admin dashboard

Admin CRUD for legal pages also included.

Set {{base_url}} (e.g. https://your-host) and {{token}} (Sanctum Bearer) in collection variables.

item.name: 1. Register as Merchant
item.description:
POST /api/mobile/auth/register-merchant

Creates a User (role=merchant) + a Merchant row with approved=false (pending admin review).
Returns Arabic success message: "تم إرسال طلبك بنجاح".

Constraints:
- accepted_terms MUST be true/1 — validated with Laravel's 'accepted' rule.
- All coupon IDs must belong to the same merchant.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "أحمد محمد",
    "email": "ahmed.merchant@example.com",
    "phone": "+201012345678",
    "password": "password123",
    "password_confirmation": "password123",
    "company_name": "مطعم البيتزا الذهبية",
    "company_name_ar": "مطعم البيتزا الذهبية",
    "company_name_en": "Golden Pizza Restaurant",
    "description": "أفضل بيتزا في القاهرة",
    "description_ar": "أفضل بيتزا في القاهرة",
    "description_en": "Best pizza in Cairo",
    "address": "15 شارع التحرير، وسط البلد",
    "city": "القاهرة",
    "accepted_terms": true
}

request.description:
Registers a new merchant account.

Key field: **accepted_terms** must be `true` — the user must explicitly agree to the terms and conditions.

On success (201): returns token + Arabic message "تم إرسال طلبك بنجاح".
The test script auto-saves the token to the collection variable.

response.name: 201 Created — success
422 — accepted_terms not accepted
422 — email/phone already taken

request.description: Minimal fields only. accepted_terms is still required.

item.name: Register as Merchant (rejected — T&C not accepted)
2. Merchant Application Status
item.description:
GET /api/mobile/merchant/application/status

Auth required (Bearer token). Returns the current approval status of the authenticated user's merchant application.

Possible status values:
- pending   → application submitted, waiting for admin review
- accepted  → approved = true (merchant can now log in fully)
- rejected  → status = disabled (admin explicitly rejected)

request.description:
Returns status, bilingual message, merchant ID and company name.

Status → Arabic label:
  pending  → قيد المراجعة
  accepted → مقبول
  rejected → مرفوض

response.name: 200 — pending
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "status": "pending",
    "status_ar": "قيد المراجعة",
    "message": "طلبك قيد المراجعة، سيتم إشعارك عند اتخاذ القرار.",
    "message_ar": "طلبك قيد المراجعة، سيتم إشعارك عند اتخاذ القرار.",
    "message_en": "Your application is under review. You will be notified once a decision is made.",
    "merchant_id": 7,
    "company_name": "مطعم البيتزا الذهبية",
    "accepted_terms": true,
    "rejection_reason": null,
    "applied_at": "2026-04-20T10:00:00+00:00"
  }
}

response.name: 200 — accepted
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "status": "accepted",
    "status_ar": "مقبول",
    "message": "تم قبول طلبك، يمكنك الآن استخدام حساب التاجر.",
    "message_ar": "تم قبول طلبك، يمكنك الآن استخدام حساب التاجر.",
    "message_en": "Your application has been accepted. You can now use your merchant account.",
    "merchant_id": 7,
    "company_name": "مطعم البيتزا الذهبية",
    "accepted_terms": true,
    "rejection_reason": null,
    "applied_at": "2026-04-20T10:00:00+00:00"
  }
}

response.name: 200 — rejected
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "status": "rejected",
    "status_ar": "مرفوض",
    "message": "تم رفض طلبك.",
    "message_ar": "تم رفض طلبك.",
    "message_en": "Your application has been rejected.",
    "merchant_id": 7,
    "company_name": "مطعم البيتزا الذهبية",
    "accepted_terms": true,
    "rejection_reason": "البيانات التجارية غير مكتملة",
    "applied_at": "2026-04-20T10:00:00+00:00"
  }
}

response.name: 404 — no merchant application

item.name: 3. Legal Pages (Public)
item.description:
GET /api/mobile/app/legal-pages

Public endpoint. Returns all four legal sections managed from the admin dashboard:
  - terms          → شروط الاستخدام
  - privacy        → سياسة الخصوصية
  - merchant_terms → شروط التاجر
  - platform_rules → قواعد المنصة

Each item has { type, label_ar, label_en, label, sections[] }.
Sections are admin-managed rows from the app_policies table.

request.description: Returns all 4 legal page groups in Arabic.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Same endpoint but titles/descriptions returned in English.
Filter to a single type. Returns only شروط الاستخدام sections.

item.name: 4. Admin — Manage Legal Pages (CRUD)
item.description:
Admin dashboard endpoints for managing the 4 legal page types from the backend.
All requests require auth:sanctum + admin middleware.

New types accepted by the backend:
  terms          → شروط الاستخدام
  merchant_terms → شروط التاجر
  platform_rules → قواعد المنصة
  (privacy, about, support continue to work as before)

query.description: terms | privacy | merchant_terms | platform_rules | about | support

request.description: Admin list. Filter by type to see one page group.

item.name: POST Create Legal Section — terms (شروط الاستخدام)

body.raw:
{
    "type": "terms",
    "title_ar": "شروط الاستخدام",
    "title_en": "Terms of Use",
    "description_ar": "نص شروط الاستخدام بالعربية...",
    "description_en": "Terms of use text in English...",
    "order_index": 0,
    "is_active": true
}

request.description: Create a new Terms of Use section.

item.name: POST Create Legal Section — merchant_terms (شروط التاجر)

body.raw:
{
    "type": "merchant_terms",
    "title_ar": "شروط التاجر",
    "title_en": "Merchant Terms",
    "description_ar": "نص شروط التاجر بالعربية...",
    "description_en": "Merchant terms text in English...",
    "order_index": 0,
    "is_active": true
}

request.description: Create a new Merchant Terms section.

item.name: POST Create Legal Section — platform_rules (قواعد المنصة)

body.raw:
{
    "type": "platform_rules",
    "title_ar": "قواعد المنصة",
    "title_en": "Platform Rules",
    "description_ar": "نص قواعد المنصة بالعربية...",
    "description_en": "Platform rules text in English...",
    "order_index": 0,
    "is_active": true
}

request.description: Create a new Platform Rules section.

body.raw:
{
    "title_ar": "شروط الاستخدام (محدّثة)",
    "title_en": "Terms of Use (updated)",
    "description_ar": "النص المحدّث بالعربية...",
    "description_en": "Updated text in English...",
    "is_active": true
}

request.description: Update any section by ID. Replace '1' with actual section ID.
Bulk reorder any sections (works for all types).
